title: How to get custom field from user profile?

posts.author: Jaap-CAD2M (Jaap Holweg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’ve added a custom field to the user profile (“Firstname”). How to get the contents of that field using a query?

query MyQuery {
users(ids: 18245638) {
email
id
name
title
}
}

Adding “firstname” to the list of fieldnames results in “Field ‘firstname’ doesn’t exist on type ‘User’”. How to get the fieldname?

Thanks,

Jaap

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Jaap-CAD2M

At this time, I’m afraid it is not possible to query custom User fields via the API. In this specific case, it seems like you could query the “name” field instead, but I definitely understand you might have wanted to query a custom field that stores information not available in other user fields.

I’ve passed this as an improvement suggestion to our product team That said, I can’t confirm when or whether this would be part of our API at this time.

I hope this helps clarify!

-Alex

posts.author: janck (Jan Kiecksee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AlexSavchuk ,

any updates here? This functionality would make my life a lot easier since I work on a project that is heavily based on user details/extended fields. The standard fields force me to get hacky by misusing fields that are intended to be used otherwise. Using a field this way works somehow but it is a mess for any user.

Cheers

posts.author: janck (Jan Kiecksee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AlexSavchuk,
almost one week later…still interested

posts.author: maxim (Maxim Krušina)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Monday, it’s Sunday and nothing… we need this so much too!

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@janck @maxim

I’m afraid this is still not an option that our API provides just yet, although I can clearly see how this would benefit you in your use case. At this time, I can’t share any kind of ETA, but I’ve made sure ou team is aware of your needs here

Thank you for checking in, I appreciate your help in making our API more and more robust for different purposes.

-Alex

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I think if I understand the issue correctly, there is a way to extract a first name from a field using the formula column. You could use the following formula in a formula column and then extract that information using your API.

REPLACE(LOWER(LEFT({column},FIND(" “,{column})-1)),1,1,UPPER(LEFT(LEFT({column},FIND(” ",{column})-1),1)))

Let me know if this helps your issue!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @kallikakis!

I do not have any updates about this.

If this gets implemented, it will probably be posted on our changelog

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml: This would also be useful for our organization. The best workaround I’ve come up with is to maintain a “user contact info” board that has a column for their Monday user ID, and then you can add columns for whatever fields you need. Instead of pulling the user profile, you search this board for that user ID, and you get whatever info you’ve stored for that user’s item. It would be nice to just be able to use the built in profiles though.

posts.author: brianjw (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 for this feature request.

We would like to store Salesforce User Ids as a custom field on Monday.com user profiles. We use Zapier to generate Salesforce Campaigns from status changes on Monday.com boards. It would be ideal to inform Salesforce which User Id should be set as the Owner of the Campaign and it makes sense for that info to live on a user profile. That’s just one example use-case.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @brianjw,

Thank you for the feedback! I have added your vote for this request

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done

posts.author: harry.pask (harry)
posts.cookedHtml:
This has finally been added:

monday.com Platform API

New ability to query user profile custom fields

API version: 2025-04 We've recently added two new fields to the users object, making it easier to query and manage custom fields in the user profile: custom_field_metas : Retrieves metadata about the custom field, including its type, description, and...

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @harry.pask,

Welcome to the community!

You’re absolutely correct - thanks for catching this. I will mark this feature request as released

Best,
Rachel
